title: vriesea × gracilis
intro: Vriesea × gracilis, also known as the Peacock Plant, is a popular, low-maintenance houseplant that belongs to the family Bromeliaceae. It is prized for its vibrant, long-lasting flowers and attractive foliage. The medicinal properties of Vriesea × gracilis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is used to make teas and infusions that are said to promote relaxation, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable addition to natural health remedies.
